description:
!MLA!

“He may not look like he gets bitches, but honey that dick was 11 inches…”

Inspired by Emo Boy sung by Ayesha Erotica. I… don’t really know what to put here lol. Considering making a bot for his coworker. I already have an alt scenario in mind for this guy so that may or may not come out. Anyway, as always love you guys- lotsa hugs and kisses from yours truly <33

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

ART IS NOT MINE- Belongs to [TSUMOI](https://twitter.com/pafujojo) from twitter!!
